section_miscategorizations.text: He also states his blood pressure is elevated
section_miscategorizations.reason: The patient's subjective report of elevated blood pressure is directly contradicted by the objective, normal-range blood pressure documented in O. Leaving this unqualified subjective claim in S without clarification could mislead a reader about the actual blood pressure status.

section_miscategorizations.text: Continue the patient's current medication regimen, including chlorthalidone.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The note provides no prior mention of chlorthalidone or any change to it; as written, this reads as a description of the existing regimen rather than a new or modified order. Without explicit framing as a treatment decision, it functions as current medication state, which belongs in S.
